name: vike-mail
description: The mail PORT: sendMail() + a swappable transport contract/registry (console/outbox in dev, Resend/SES/SMTP in prod), sending through vike-queue. Framework-agnostic and provider-neutral, the mail twin of @universal-orm/core: producers (vike-auth, vike-stripe, ...) depend on this port; the app registers the concrete transport.
